_doc: Hand-maintained B3 ticker rename/merger map, consumed by build_ml_dataset.apply_ticker_continuity(). Types: rename (same legal entity, splice prices+fundamentals), merger (entity ceased, splice prices only via exchange ratio), tender (cash-out, no splice — terminal-event task). 'date' is documentation; the splice boundary is the new ticker's actual first trade date. Only add entries whose ratio is verified — a wrong ratio corrupts the series, while an absent entry just leaves two clean separate series (LAME3/LAME4 -> AMER3 legs are deliberately absent for exactly that reason: their exchange ratios need verification before entry).

events.notes: TIM Participacoes incorporated into TIM S.A., 1:1

B2W Digital renamed Americanas S.A. after combination with Lojas Americanas ops; B2W is the surviving listed entity, shares 1:1. Fundamentals step at the boundary is a real corporate event, not a data error.
Duratex renamed Dexco
Via Varejo renamed Via
BR Distribuidora renamed Vibra Energia
Cyrela Commercial Properties renamed Syn Propriedades e Servicos Estruturados

Cia. Hering incorporated into Grupo de Moda Soma. Each HGTX3 share received 0.5833 SOMA3 shares plus a cash parcel of R$ 9.66. Price splice requires cash-component adjustment depending on model choice.
CESP incorporated into Auren Energia. Each CESP6 share converted to 0.3314 AURE3 common shares plus R$ 14.67 cash component.
SulAmérica incorporated by Rede D'Or São Luiz. Each SULA11 Unit swapped into 0.696135 RDOR3 common shares.
BR Malls merged into Aliansce Sonae. Each BRML3 share received 0.04046162985854 ALOS3 shares plus R$ 1.34 cash fraction. Entity renamed later to Allos.
Via renamed Grupo Casas Bahia (chain: VVAR3 -> VIIA3 -> BHIA3)
Grupo Soma fully merged into Arezzo&Co, entity renamed to Azzas 2154 S.A. Each SOMA3 share converted to 0.120516471946 AZZA3 shares. Slices price backward safely into AZZA3 core data series.
Enauta merged with 3R Petroleum to form Brava Energia. Transition structured via corporate consolidation; ticker mapped 1:1 on equivalent base terms.
Embraer ticker refresh (global brand alignment with NYSE ERJ->EMBJ); no change to share count or rights
Eletrobras renamed Axia Energia, 3 years post-privatization; common shares
Eletrobras renamed Axia Energia; preferred A shares
Eletrobras renamed Axia Energia; preferred B shares
Guararapes renamed to align with Riachuelo retail brand

Natura & Co Holding (NTCO3) wound back into Natura Cosmeticos (NATU3), reversing the 2019 holding-company reorg -- NTCO3 stopped trading in 2025 (its fundamentals stop 2025-06-30 while NATU3's continue to 2026-03-31, and company_info shows NATU3 ATIVO / NTCO3 CANCELADA). Ratio verified empirically: raw prices 100% identical close across the full overlapping history. Exact date NOT independently confirmed (placeholder); harmless since apply_ticker_continuity() derives the real splice boundary from NATU3's own first trade date, not this field -- verify against B3/CVM if the date itself is ever needed.

Marfrig Global Foods ticker refresh. Ratio verified empirically: raw prices 100% identical close across the full overlapping history. Direction verified via company_info: MRFG3 absent from the current registry, MBRF3 is ATIVO -- same signature as EMBR3->EMBJ3/ELET3->AXIA3. Exact rename date NOT independently confirmed (placeholder within the late-2025/early-2026 B3 ticker-refresh wave); harmless since apply_ticker_continuity() derives the real splice boundary from MBRF3's own first trade date, not this field -- verify against B3/CVM if the date itself is ever needed.

Odontoprev ticker refresh (Bradsaude branding). Ratio verified empirically: raw prices 100% identical close across the full overlapping history. Direction verified via company_info: ODPV3 absent from the current registry, SAUD3 is ATIVO -- same signature as EMBR3->EMBJ3/ELET3->AXIA3. Exact rename date NOT independently confirmed (placeholder within the late-2025/early-2026 B3 ticker-refresh wave); harmless since apply_ticker_continuity() derives the real splice boundary from SAUD3's own first trade date, not this field -- verify against B3/CVM if the date itself is ever needed.

BM&FBOVESPA (BVMF3) merged with Cetip to form B3 S.A. (B3SA3). Web-verified corporate event, not a coincidence: BVMF3 last trade 2018-03-23 @ R$25.43, B3SA3 first trade 2018-03-26 @ R$25.66 (ratio 1.009, effectively 1:1). Splice creates a continuous 18-year B3 history.

BK Brasil renamed Zamp S.A. (multi-brand rebrand: Burger King + Popeyes). Web-verified: ticker change effective 2022-10-26. Data confirms adjacency: BKBR3 last trade 2022-10-25 @ R$7.63, ZAMP3 first trade 2022-10-26 @ R$7.57 (ratio 0.992, effectively 1:1).

CSU CardSystem renamed CSU Digital (payments/fintech repositioning). Web-verified: ticker change effective 2022-09-15. Data confirms adjacency: CARD3 last trade 2022-09-14 @ R$14.51, CSUD3 first trade 2022-09-15 @ R$15.12 (ratio 1.042, effectively 1:1).

Wiz Solucoes e Corretagem de Seguros renamed Wiz Co (strategic repositioning announced 2022-11-29). Web-verified: ticker change effective 2023-02-09. Data confirms adjacency: WIZS3 last trade 2023-02-08 @ R$7.16, WIZC3 first trade 2023-02-09 @ R$6.80 (ratio 0.950, effectively 1:1).

ISA CTEEP renamed ISA Energia Brasil (national expansion beyond Sao Paulo concessions); ticker refresh TRPL3/TRPL4 -> ISAE3/ISAE4. Web-verified: effective 2024-11-18. Data confirms adjacency: TRPL4 last trade 2024-11-14 @ R$24.20, ISAE4 first trade 2024-11-18 @ R$24.07 (ratio 0.995, effectively 1:1).

Celpa (Centrais Eletricas do Para) renamed Equatorial Energia Para, common shares. Web-verified: Celpa brand replaced by Equatorial Para in Dec 2019. Data confirms adjacency: CELP3 last trade 2019-12-17 @ R$2.79, EQPA3 first trade 2019-12-18 @ R$2.89 (ratio 1.036, effectively 1:1). NOTE: CELP5/CELP6/CELP7 are separate preferred share classes of the same company that traded in PARALLEL with CELP3 for years (not a sequential handoff) and have no surviving preferred-class successor (EQPA5/6/7 have no fundamentals coverage and are excluded from the build) -- deliberately left unspliced; treated via status inference instead.

Estacio Participacoes renamed Yduqs Participacoes (new holding brand, Estacio brand retained for higher-ed operations). Web-verified: ticker change effective 2019-07-23. Data confirms adjacency: ESTC3 last trade 2019-07-22 @ R$33.52, YDUQ3 first trade 2019-07-23 @ R$34.36 (ratio 1.025, effectively 1:1).

CCR S.A. renamed Motiva Infraestrutura de Mobilidade (brand refresh announced 2025-03-21). Web-verified across multiple independent BR financial news sources: ticker change effective the 2025-05-02 session, replacing CCRO3. Data confirms: company_info's cvm_code for MOTV3 (18821) matches CCRO3's; CCRO3 last real-volume trade 2025-04-28 @ R$13.15 (volume ~9.3M), MOTV3 first trade 2025-05-02 @ R$13.98 (volume ~6.1M, ratio 1.063, small 2-day drift, not an exchange ratio). Without this entry, CCRO3's raw file continues past the rename with near-zero volume (100-2000 shares/day) and wildly erratic thin-market prices (e.g. R$0.63 -> R$39.99 within two weeks) that are NOT a data error but an orphaned/dead ticker code still nominally listed -- confirmed independently via yfinance, which reports CCRO3.SA as delisted from this date. 2026-07-14 top-50 ML-readiness audit (TOP50_ML_READINESS_AUDIT.md) originally flagged this as a 52-day trading-calendar gap and treated CCRO3 as a live top-50 name through today; this splice corrects that. `old_last_date` added 2026-07-15 (second, independent audit pass): the boundary (MOTV3's first trade, 2025-05-02) is 4 days after CCRO3's documented last REAL trade (2025-04-28) -- the 2 dead-stub days between them (2025-04-29 R$0.63/400sh, 2025-04-30 R$0.77/100sh, the exact 'R$0.63' example cited above) were being relabeled as MOTV3 history by the boundary-only logic, producing a fake two-day whipsaw right at the top of MOTV3's spliced series. `old_last_date` drops CCRO3 rows after this date outright instead of splicing them in.
